item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-10)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 44274 Trending skills: 22565 Hot skills: 2892 Top All Time: find-skills (483988) Top Trending: simple (19244) Top Hot: ai-image-generation (648)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): clerk-nextjs-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 30 Source: clerk/skills Description: Advanced Next.js patterns - middleware, Server Actions, caching with Clerk.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): nano-banana
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 636 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini native image models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Gemini 3 Pro Image, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input. Triggers: nano banana, gemini image, gemini 3 pro image, gemini 2.5 flash image, google image generation, native image generation, gemini native image

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): dialogue-audio
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 51 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Multi-speaker dialogue audio creation with Dia TTS. Covers speaker tags, emotion control, pacing, conversation flow, and post-production. Use for: podcasts, audiobooks, explainers, character dialogue, conversational content. Triggers: dialogue audio, multi speaker, conversation audio, dia tts, two speakers, podcast audio, character voices, voice acting, dialogue generation, conversation tts, multi voice, speaker tags, dialogue recording

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): ai-voice-cloning
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 49 Source: toolshell/skills Description: AI voice generation, text-to-speech, and voice synthesis via inference.sh CLI. Models: Kokoro TTS, DIA, Chatterbox, Higgs, VibeVoice for natural speech. Capabilities: multiple voices, emotions, accents, long-form narration, conversation. Use for: voiceovers, audiobooks, podcasts, video narration, accessibility. Triggers: voice cloning, tts, text to speech, ai voice, voice generation, voice synthesis, voice over, narration, speech synthesis, ai narrator, elevenlabs alternative, natural voice, realistic speech, voice ai

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 196 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): agent-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 90 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Batteries-included agent component for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. One component with runtime, tools, streaming, approvals, and widgets built in. Capabilities: drop-in agent, human-in-the-loop, client-side tools, form filling. Use for: building AI chat interfaces, agentic UIs, SaaS copilots, assistants. Triggers: agent component, agent ui, chat agent, shadcn agent, react agent, agentic ui, ai assistant ui, copilot ui, inference ui, human in the loop

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): remotion-render
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 611 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. Pass TSX code, get MP4. Supports all Remotion APIs: useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, spring, interpolate, AbsoluteFill, Sequence. Configurable resolution, FPS, duration, codec. Use for: programmatic video generation, animated graphics, motion design, data-driven videos, React animations to video. Triggers: remotion, render video from code, tsx to video, react video, programmatic video, remotion render, code to video, animated video, motion graphics code, react animation video

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): ui-ux-pro-max
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 61 Source: nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill Description: UI/UX design intelligence. 50 styles, 21 palettes, 50 font pairings, 20 charts, 9 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 65 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): gh-cli
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 17 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: GitHub CLI (gh) comprehensive reference for repositories, issues, pull requests, Actions, projects, releases, gists, codespaces, organizations, extensions, and all GitHub operations from the command line.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): image-generation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 11 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate high-quality images via MCP (Gemini models or compatible services) using structured prompts, ratios, and validation for marketing, UI, or presentations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): image-upscaling
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 59 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Upscale and enhance images with Real-ESRGAN, Thera, Topaz, FLUX Upscaler via inference.sh CLI. Models: Real-ESRGAN, Thera (any size), FLUX Dev Upscaler, Topaz Image Upscaler. Use for: enhance low-res images, upscale AI art, restore old photos, increase resolution. Triggers: upscale image, image upscaler, enhance image, increase resolution, real esrgan, ai upscale, super resolution, image enhancement, upscaling, enlarge image, higher resolution, 4k upscale, hd upscale

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): git-commit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 14 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Execute git commit with conventional commit message analysis, intelligent staging, and message generation. Use when user asks to commit changes, create a git commit, or mentions "/commit". Supports: (1) Auto-detecting type and scope from changes, (2) Generating conventional commit messages from diff, (3) Interactive commit with optional type/scope/description overrides, (4) Intelligent file staging for logical grouping

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): tools-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 83 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Tool lifecycle UI components for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Display tool calls: pending, progress, approval required, results. Capabilities: tool status, progress indicators, approval flows, results display. Use for: showing agent tool calls, human-in-the-loop approvals, tool output. Triggers: tool ui, tool calls, tool status, tool approval, tool results, agent tools, mcp tools ui, function calling ui, tool lifecycle, tool pending

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): pitch-deck-visuals
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 52 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Investor pitch deck structure with slide-by-slide framework, visual design rules, and data presentation. Covers the 12-slide framework, chart types, team slides, and common investor turn-offs. Use for: fundraising decks, investor presentations, startup pitch, demo day, grant proposals. Triggers: pitch deck, investor deck, startup pitch, fundraising deck, demo day, pitch presentation, investor presentation, seed deck, series a deck, pitch slides, startup presentation, vc pitch, investor meeting

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): find-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 488 Source: vercel-labs/skills Description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): flux-image
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 54 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Generate images with FLUX models (Black Forest Labs) via inference.sh CLI. Rank: #31 Installs: 39 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Technical blog post writing with structure, code examples, and developer audience conventions. item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 39 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Build automated AI workflows combining multiple models and services. item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 28 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Presentation creation, editing, and analysis. When Claude needs to work with presentations (.pptx files) for: (1) Creating new presentations, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with layouts, (4) Adding comments or speaker notes, or any other presentation tasks

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): tailwind-design-system
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 21 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Build scalable design systems with Tailwind CSS, design tokens, component libraries, and responsive patterns. Use when creating component libraries, implementing design systems, or standardizing UI patterns.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): gemini-api-dev
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 17 Source: google-gemini/gemini-skills Description: Use this skill when building applications with Gemini models, Gemini API, working with multimodal content (text, images, audio, video), implementing function calling, using structured outputs, or needing current model specifications. Covers SDK usage (google-genai for Python, @google/genai for JavaScript/TypeScript), model selection, and API capabilities.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): skill-vetter
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 14 Source: useai-pro/openclaw-skills-security Description: Security-first vetting for OpenClaw skills. Use before installing any skill from ClawHub, GitHub, or other sources. Checks for red flags, permission scope, and suspicious patterns.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): sentry-fix-issues
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 8 Source: getsentry/sentry-for-ai Description: Find and fix issues from Sentry using MCP. Use when asked to fix Sentry errors, debug production issues, investigate exceptions, or resolve bugs reported in Sentry. Methodically analyzes stack traces, breadcrumbs, traces, and context to identify root causes.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): product-photography
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 47 Source: toolshell/skills Description: AI product photography with studio lighting, lifestyle shots, and packshot conventions. item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): ai-sdk
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 12 Source: vercel/ai Description: Answer questions about the AI SDK and help build AI-powered features. Use when developers: (1) Ask about AI SDK functions like generateText, streamText, ToolLoopAgent, embed, or tools, (2) Want to build AI agents, chatbots, RAG systems, or text generation features, (3) Have questions about AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.), streaming, tool calling, structured output, or embeddings, (4) Use React hooks like useChat or useCompletion. item.title: [All Time] Rank down (12 → 15): microsoft-foundry
item.description: All Time leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #12 Current rank: #15 Delta: -3 Installs: 126598 (prev 125500) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Use this skill to work with Microsoft Foundry (Azure AI Foundry): deploy AI models from catalog, build RAG applications with knowledge indexes, create and evaluate AI agents, manage RBAC permissions and role assignments, manage quotas and capacity, create Foundry resources. USE FOR: Microsoft Foundry, AI Foundry, deploy model, model catalog, RAG, knowledge index, create agent, evaluate agent, agent monitoring, create Foundry project, new Foundry project, set up Foundry, onboard to Foundry, provision Foundry infrastructure, create Foundry resource, create AI Services, multi-service resource, AIServices kind, register resource provider, enable Cognitive Services, setup AI Services account, create resource group for Foundry, RBAC, role assignment, managed identity, service principal, permissions, quota, capacity, TPM, deployment failure, QuotaExceeded. DO NOT USE FOR: Azure Functions (use azure-functions), App Service (use azure-create-app), generic Azure resource creation (use azure-create-app).

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (10 → 47): self-improvement
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #47 Delta: -37 Installs: 19 (prev 44) Source: pskoett/self-improving-agent Description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (11 → 37): app-store-screenshots
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #11 Current rank: #37 Delta: -26 Installs: 10 (prev 20) Source: parthjadhav/app-store-screenshots Description: Use when building App Store screenshot pages, generating exportable marketing screenshots for iOS apps, or creating programmatic screenshot generators with Next.js. Triggers on app store, screenshots, marketing assets, html-to-image, phone mockup.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (18 → 15): python-sdk
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #18 Current rank: #15 Delta: +3 Installs: 85 (prev 78) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Python SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, and integrate with 150+ models. Package: inferencesh (pip install inferencesh). Supports sync/async, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, and human approval. Use for: Python integration, AI apps, agent development, RAG pipelines, automation. Triggers: python sdk, inferencesh, pip install, python api, python client, async inference, python agent, tool builder python, programmatic ai, python integration, sdk python
